languages.text: "Не корите себя. Просто мы с вами уже играли эту партию".

traits.locale_text: Драфт: мы просто уже играли эту партию.

languages.text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."
languages.original_text: "Не корите себя. Просто мы с вами уже играли эту партию".

traits.locale_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."
"Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."
"Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

languages.text: “不必自责。这棋局你我早就经历过，不过重演一回罢了。”
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: “不必自责。这棋局你我早就经历过，不过重演一回罢了。”

languages.text: « Ne vous reprochez pas votre défaite. Si j'ai réussi à gagner, c'est simplement parce que nous avons déjà fait cette partie. »
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous reprochez pas votre défaite. Si j'ai réussi à gagner, c'est simplement parce que nous avons déjà fait cette partie. »

languages.text: "Kendine kızma. Seninle bu turu daha önce oynamıştık."
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: "Kendine kızma. Seninle bu turu daha önce oynamıştık."

languages.text: «No se culpe; es solo que ya hemos jugado esta partida».
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: «No se culpe; es solo que ya hemos jugado esta partida».

languages.text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe. Wir haben das hier einfach schon einmal durchgespielt."
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe. Wir haben das hier einfach schon einmal durchgespielt."

languages.text: 「自分を責めないで。君と私がこのラウンドを前にやっただけだ」
languages.original_text: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."

traits.locale_text: 「自分を責めないで。君と私がこのラウンドを前にやっただけだ」
